title: Start of Item "✨" emoji removal
excerpt:
I am currently building a centralised calander for all of our companies activities. I cannot automate using mirror coloumns, formula coloumns even with using third party application like make.com. 
So I found your soluti…

posts.author: Reed74 (Liam)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am currently building a centralised calander for all of our companies activities. I cannot automate using mirror coloumns, formula coloumns even with using third party application like make.com.

So I found your solution to be the best fit. However when using this automation it adds a star emoji to the start of the item name. This is a major issue as we have a specific naming code to track items throughout all process.

Are there any solutions out there that removes this emoji so that I can finalise the project?

Thank you

posts.author: garfield-labs (Snir Alon)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there, if the issue is due to our app “same item multiple boards”, you can disable this feature by navigating to the “same item multiple boards” tab inside any of the item views. Hope that helps!
